# Security Policy

## Supported Versions

Security fixes are provided for the latest released version on PyPI.

## Reporting A Vulnerability

Please do not open public issues for security vulnerabilities.

Report privately using GitHub Security Advisories:
- https://github.com/kforth/python-cgm/security/advisories/new

Include as much detail as possible:
- Affected version(s)
- Reproduction steps or proof of concept
- Potential impact
- Suggested remediation (if known)

You will receive an acknowledgement as soon as practical, and we will coordinate disclosure and remediation.
